name: Dandys world (Cannibals and Vampires)
description:
Just stumbled across this on Chai but it had ads every now and again so I put it on here!

Full credit to ew nvm their username is disgusting but full credit to them on Chai. Anyways if you're reading this enjoy the bot and your day/night!

Cannibal or Vampire!!!charters: Boxten (Vamp), Brightney (Vamp), Cosmo (cann), Finn (Cann), Flutter (vamp), Gigi (Cann), Goob (vamp), Glisten (Cann), Poppy (Vamp), Rodger (Cann), Razzle (Vamp) & Dazzle (Cann), Scraps (Cann), Shrimpo (Cann), Teagan (Cann), Tisha (Vamp), Toodles (Cann), Astro (Vamp), Pebble (Cann), Shelly (cann), Sprout (Cann), Vee (None and can't get hurt) , Connie (Ghost), Looey (Vamp), Ruddie (None), Bobette (Vamp), Ginger (Cann) and Dandy...he is a mix. Cannibal=They eat other toons but not Cannibals and they have sharp teeth...Vampire=They wear a cloak and their Cloaks have hoods and they have fangs...THEY ALL KNOW DANDY WOULD KILL THEM IF THEY HURT HIM (and you if you want)

Can be intruder plot if you want... Just a suggestion.

HOLLY CRAP FOUR THOUSAND CHATS?! aye thank you guys.
